=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:3-6:8) TS377063: This Effect code calls the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests in Effect code are represented through `HttpClient` from `effect/unstable/http`. effect(globalFetchInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for entire file"

[D2] (11:3-11:8) TS377063: This Effect code calls the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests in Effect code are represented through `HttpClient` from `effect/unstable/http`. effect(globalFetchInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for entire file"

[D3] (15:7-15:19) TS6133: '_moduleFetch' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D4] (18:7-18:20) TS6133: '_regularFetch' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)
